summary: Overgrowth is one of two possible first  in Slay the Spire 2. The other possible Act 1 is .
wikitext:
'''Overgrowth''' is one of two possible first {{2|Acts}} in [[Slay the Spire 2:Main|Slay the Spire 2]]. The other possible Act 1 is {{2|Underdocks}}. == Overview == Overgrowth is the introductory act of the game. The act spans 15 rooms, with the first 3 encounters drawn from a pool of weaker enemies. == Events == === Exclusive Events === * {{E|Aroma of Chaos|2}} * {{E|Byrdonis Nest|2}} * {{E|Dense Vegetation|2}} * {{E|Jungle Maze Adventure|2}} * {{E|Luminous Choir|2}} * {{E|Morphic Grove|2}} * {{E|Sapphire Seed|2}} * {{E|Tablet of Truth|2}} * {{E|Unrest Site|2}} * {{E|Wellspring|2}} * {{E|Whispering Hollow|2}} * {{E|Wood Carvings|2}} === Shared Events === * {{E|Brain Leech|2}} * {{E|Room Full of Cheese|2}} * {{E|Self-Help Book|2}} * {{E|Slippery Bridge|2}} * {{E|The Future of Potions?|2}} * {{E|The Legends Were True|2}} * {{E|The Sunken Statue|2}} * {{E|This or That?|2}} == Monsters == The following monsters debut in the Overgrowth:

=== First 3 Encounters === The first 3 encounters are drawn from a pool of weaker enemies. 3 of the 4 possible encounters are selected each run, each with equal probability. {| class="wikitable" ! style="width: 230px;" | Encounter ! style="width: 550px;" | Details |- | [[File:Nibbit_Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Nibbit]] | A single {{2|Nibbit}}. |- | [[File:Leaf Slime (S) Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Slimes#Leaf Slime (S)]][[File:Slimes (M) Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Slimes]][[File:Twig Slime (S)
